assertions.evidence: Positive resolver fixtures passed, including declared functions, local bindings, enum variants, fields, impl blocks, and trait-bound forms.
Negative resolver fixtures rejected undefined variables and functions with diagnostics containing undefined-name information.
Negative resolver fixtures rejected unknown type names in return positions and let annotations with undefined-type diagnostics.
Negative resolver fixtures rejected duplicate function, struct, and enum definitions with duplicate diagnostics.

frictions: Initial attempt used an incorrect dune runtest target name; direct dune exec of test/test_resolver.exe is the working resolver-focused command.
